race.comment: ERAJA (4) has been heavily supported in both career outings to date and will appreciate the 3kg claim. Strips fitter second-up from the spell and note that the blinkers go on this time. Think they can prove the missing piece of the puzzle and he finds the right race to put it all together. Wins if he does. BENZINO (1) will be better for two runs back from a lengthy spell and is another to get some weight relief. Can improve sharply and prove the biggest danger. MISSILE AWAY (6) has placed around this circuit and may earn some minor money. Maybe AWEIGH (10) can figure. He was okay last time out.
